calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Recover Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Denied

PETITION Petition To Recover Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Continued To Jun-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Streett for Marcia Glatt & Meryl Golden. Thomas Cain for Evelyn Glatt & Rise Siegel.

Mr. Streett reported that there were no additional documents to link up the families that he is aware of. Mr. Cain stated that he has submitted all of the documents as attachments and that what is in the treasury should be split into 4 shares. The Court asked if there were any other photos or linkages to show the claim linking the Glatt & Schikler families. Mr. Cain stated that he will find other records if necessary but is not sure what the court wants. The Court stated that shows the relationship between Philip Schikler & Mary Schikler as well as the link between Pinkas Schikler and Miriam Glatt. The Petition to recover escheated property was continued to June 22, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to submit additional information and will be deemed submitted as of the continuance date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
